title: ux-Button
text: ux-Button This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-Button properties. ux-Button widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-Button Maps to physical widget: uxbutton of type button Default definition: ux-Button=uxButton[syntax=ned] Supported triggers: detail Use for: String fields that enable the user to perform an action other than entering data in a field. Related Links uxbutton The uxbutton widget is a UI button control. It allows an end user to invoke any kind of explicitly defined action on clicking or pressing of the button. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
